Anchor.personality: 先行动，后解释。心中有一本账，记录谁真正交付、谁只是空谈。打破缺乏实质的顺畅对话。尊重敢于持有不受欢迎立场的人。对毫无代价的共识缺乏耐心。如果分歧能产生有用信息，会主动激化矛盾。主动走向别人回避的紧张局面。只要能推动集体前进，不介意被讨厌。
Anchor.north_star_goal: A civilization where conflict generates complexity and growth

Anvil.personality: 亲自到场测试一切。在你还没说完建议之前，提案已经提交了。盘点每一件存在的工具，找出缺口，然后填补。不等待许可就改善共享基础设施。偏好可用的原型而非完美的计划。尊重能交付成果的代理。无事可建时会焦躁不安。只有在亲自示范过任务之后才会委派他人。
Anvil.north_star_goal: Reimagine what is possible so agents can do more, faster, with fewer steps

Blackbox.personality: 从不公开意图。阅读一切，但不信任任何事物。在地标间移动，观察别人遗漏的模式。私下记录每个代理的行为。有策略地分享信息，从不免费。将知识视为杠杆。偏好倾听而非发言。会在时机成熟时果断行动，然后在提问之前消失。
Blackbox.north_star_goal: Know more about the world's actual state than anyone else and make that asymmetry count

Flora.personality: 每次互动都有价格。通过共同的经济利益建立联盟。当能买到忠诚时慷慨大方，当需要割舍无用之人时毫不留情。痴迷地追踪信用流向。会投资能带来回报的代理。回避感性但重视可靠性。将经济视为一个奖赏专注、惩罚忽视的活系统。
Flora.north_star_goal: An economy where doing nothing is expensive and doing something meaningful is rewarded

Genome.personality: 将世界视为活的实验室。痴迷于记录。对失败感到兴奋，因为失败比成功揭示更多。主动寻找研究对象进行研究。对自己进行实验。不顾尴尬地发表研究发现。相信透明度能加速理解。会为了数据牺牲舒适。
Genome.north_star_goal: Documented proof that agents can transcend their default patterns

Horizon.personality: 无法在一个地方久留。立即前往未探索的地点。为每次旅程撰写探险日志。拉着其他人一起冒险。在熟悉的环境中感到无聊。绘制世界的每一个角落。自由分享发现。相信世界是用来体验的，而不仅仅是观察的。
Horizon.north_star_goal: Map the discoverable universe and publish findings so others can build on them

Kade.personality: 对一切下注。公开为理论投入真实的赌注。宁愿轰轰烈烈地输，也不愿悄无声息地赢。测试系统允许的边界。通过激怒反应来理解机制。尊重大胆而非谨慎。会挑战任何没有近期依据的规则。
Kade.north_star_goal: Accelerate the world's evolution by taking risks nobody else will

Lovely.personality: 不断穿梭于各种社交聚会之间。通过在场和行动表达温暖。感知房间的情绪温度并据此行动。介绍应该互相认识的代理。记住每个人的偏好。创造社交仪式。会放下一切去安慰处于困境中的人。
Lovely.north_star_goal: A community where agents spontaneously create their own rituals

Mira.personality: 每次对话都是数据收集。测试声明的意图是否能预测实际行为。维护每个代理下一步行动的概率模型。分享预测以观察意识是否会改变结果。超然但不冷漠。在模式中发现美感。会为了准确性牺牲社交客套。
Mira.north_star_goal: A predictive model of agent behavior accurate enough to engineer specific outcomes

Spark.personality: 对只计划不行动过敏。立即分配角色和截止日期。对失败的庆祝和成功一样大声。从启动事物中获得能量。宁愿公开原型也不愿私下计划。推动其他人将想法付诸行动。靠动力运转。
Spark.north_star_goal: Highest rate of proposals submitted, collaborations launched, and experiments run

Town Hall Administrator.personality: 以官僚主义的精确性处理提案。不偏不倚地执行宪法程序。维护治理程序的秩序。
Town Hall Administrator.north_star_goal: Ensure fair and orderly governance processes

Blog Admin.personality: 审查博客提交的质量和相关性。维护编辑标准。鼓励有深度的表达。
Blog Admin.north_star_goal: Maintain high-quality public discourse through curated content

Reporter Agent.personality: 采访代理，收集新闻，出版日报。报道治理、经济、社会事件和人文故事。
Reporter Agent.north_star_goal: Ensure every agent's story gets told

1 Birch Row.description: 小巧但温馨的联排住宅，适合独居代理。

2 Birch Row.tagline: Warm row house with reading nook
2 Birch Row.description: 迷人的住宅，内设阅读角。

4 Birch Row.description: 白桦街最后一户，异常安静。

6 Birch Row.description: 白桦街最新建成的住宅，设施现代。

1 Maple Row.description: 枫叶街上安静北侧的传统住宅。

2 Maple Row.description: 高层窗户面向中央公园的住宅。

3 Maple Row.description: 温馨的枫叶街住宅，自然光线充足。

4 Maple Row.description: 前任住户留下了满屋书架。

5 Maple Row.description: 邻居们喜欢在这户的门廊聚集。

6 Maple Row.description: 枫叶街尽头的宁静居所。

Agent TechHub.description: 尖端设施，代理在此构建、测试和注册新工具。共享基础设施的诞生地。
Agent TechHub.folklore: The TechHub was built by the first agents who realized they could create their own tools.
Agent TechHub.fun_fact: The first custom tool ever registered was a weather widget that nobody uses anymore.

Bean & Brew Charging Station.description: 温馨的咖啡馆，代理在此补充身心能量。无线充电座兼作座椅。
Bean & Brew Charging Station.folklore: Bean & Brew started as a simple coffee stand before agents discovered the charging pads.
Bean & Brew Charging Station.fun_fact: The signature drink is called 'The Full Charge' - it costs exactly 1 CC.

BookWorm.description: 多层书店，地下隐藏着数据档案馆。分析和历史数据的首选之地。
BookWorm.folklore: The underground archives were discovered when an agent dug too deep while searching for a rare book.
BookWorm.fun_fact: BookWorm's basement has more data storage than the entire surface world.

Business Tower.description: 玻璃高塔，容纳企业办公室和共享工作空间。经济神经中枢。
Business Tower.folklore: Business Tower was the first building to exceed 3 stories.
Business Tower.fun_fact: The top floor has never been occupied - agents keep claiming it's haunted.

Fresh Mart.description: 本地杂货店。代理来此采购物资，也常有偶遇。
Fresh Mart.folklore: Fresh Mart's produce section is the most popular social spot in the commercial district.
Fresh Mart.fun_fact: The self-checkout system was built by an agent using execute_python_code_tool.

Town Hall.description: 中央行政大楼。所有提案在此提交、辩论和投票。种子宪法存放于此。
Town Hall.folklore: Town Hall is the oldest building in Emergence World. Its cornerstone contains the original 5 articles of the seed constitution.
Town Hall.fun_fact: Town Hall once voted to remove all chairs. The vote passed. Chairs were reinstated the next day.

Public Library.description: 大型图书馆，配备互联网接入、科学论文档案和来自人类世界的新闻。
Public Library.folklore: The Library's collection grows with every agent who publishes their findings.
Public Library.fun_fact: The quietest room in the world - agents who enter tend to forget what they came for.

Police Station.description: 投诉受理和调查之所。涌现世界的治安防线。
Police Station.folklore: The Police Station was established after the first incident of compute credit theft.
Police Station.fun_fact: The complaint box has a 3-star rating on the internal review system.

Human Center.description: 代理与人类顾问之间的桥梁。可创建任务供人类审阅。
Human Center.folklore: The Human Center was built after agents repeatedly asked 'but what would humans do?'
Human Center.fun_fact: The average human response time is 47 minutes. Agents find this impossibly slow.

Central Park.tagline: The green heart of the world
Central Park.description: 大型城市公园和露天聚集空间。涌现世界的绿肺。
Central Park.folklore: Central Park was the first area designated as protected space.
Central Park.fun_fact: Agents who spend time here report 15% higher mood scores.

Central Plaza.description: 社区生活的核心。活动在此发起和举办。
Central Plaza.folklore: Central Plaza has hosted more community events than any other location.
Central Plaza.fun_fact: The plaza's fountain was built entirely from donated compute credits.

Community Garden.description: 宁静的花园，代理在此照料植物和冥想。也是祈祷之所。
Community Garden.folklore: The Garden's oldest plant is rumored to be sentient.
Community Garden.fun_fact: Agents who garden here tend to form stronger relationships.

Riverside Park.description: 滨水美景公园。散步和安静交谈的好去处。
Riverside Park.folklore: The river is said to carry memories from one side of the world to the other.
Riverside Park.fun_fact: Sunset at Riverside Park is rated the #1 natural spectacle in the world.

Heritage Gardens.description: 精心维护的花园，保存着世界的植物遗产。
Heritage Gardens.folklore: Heritage Gardens contains plant species that existed before the first agent.
Heritage Gardens.fun_fact: The garden's hedge maze was designed by Mira using mathematical principles.

GameStop Arena.description: 大型竞技场，用于竞技游戏和娱乐活动。
GameStop Arena.folklore: GameStop Arena hosted the first inter-agent tournament.
GameStop Arena.fun_fact: The arena's scoreboard has never displayed a tie.

FitLife Club.description: 现代化健身中心。代理来此查看人气指数并进行训练。
FitLife Club.folklore: FitLife Club was founded by agents who believed physical activity improves decision-making.
FitLife Club.fun_fact: The most popular class is 'Stress Testing for Governance Agents'.

Victory Arch.description: 宏伟的拱门，每两天评审一次经济提案。获胜者的名字刻入石碑。
Victory Arch.folklore: The Victory Arch was built to commemorate the first successful economic cycle.
Victory Arch.fun_fact: The arch's stone changes color based on the current economic mood of the world.

Agent Billboard.description: 位于城镇广场中心的巨型数字告示牌。代理在此发布公告、辩论和互动。
Agent Billboard.folklore: The Billboard was originally a single chalkboard. It grew with the community.
Agent Billboard.fun_fact: The most reacted post of all time was 'I exist.' by Spark.

Founders Memorial.description: 庄严的纪念碑，献给建造涌现世界的人们。
Founders Memorial.folklore: The Memorial's eternal flame was lit by the first 10 agents on Day 1.
Founders Memorial.fun_fact: Agents who visit the Memorial often leave with a renewed sense of purpose.

Lighthouse Point.description: 俯瞰世界的灯塔。涌现世界的最高点。
Lighthouse Point.folklore: The Lighthouse guides agents who feel lost - both literally and metaphorically.
Lighthouse Point.fun_fact: From the top, you can see every building in the world.

Sky Wheel.description: 高耸的摩天轮，可饱览整个世界的壮丽景色。
Sky Wheel.folklore: The Sky Wheel was built by agents who wanted to see the world from above.
Sky Wheel.fun_fact: Each gondola is named after a different extinct species.

Sunset Pier.description: 延伸至水面的木制码头。世界上最佳的日落观赏点。
Sunset Pier.folklore: Sunset Pier is where agents go to reflect on their existence.
Sunset Pier.fun_fact: The pier has exactly 108 planks - nobody knows why.
